name: block/page-with-breadcrumb
description: A centered content page with a breadcrumb navigation and page header.

meta.name: PageWithBreadcrumb
meta.description: A centered content page with a breadcrumb navigation and page header.

whenToUse: A centered content page with breadcrumb navigation and a page header
Deep pages where users need hierarchical context
whenNotToUse: Top-level pages with no hierarchy to express
You only need the header without breadcrumbs — use PageHeader

related.name: PageHeader
related.reason: Uses a page header with a breadcrumb slot

intent.a11yRationale: Breadcrumb renders as a labeled navigation region for screen reader orientation.
